Survey

  • Tweet

Politicans should listen to their constituents and I am very keen to hear your views on both local and national issues. Although I am out meeting people all the time, it is tough to see everybody! Please take a minute to complete the residents' survey below. I look forward to receiving your thoughts. 

Rishi Sunak MP MP for Richmond and Northallerton
